TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Lu-i.ya-ke.mang-tay.Ta-kay-al "kamu nu Ba, Louis-Jacques-Mand√© Daguerre, 1787 a mihca 11 a bulad 18 a demiad-1851 a mihca 7 a bulad 10 a demiad" lecuh i Ba-kow-wa-le-te-wa-ce-sen-pa-li-si a kitizaan a Ke-al-mey-ye "Ba a kamu, Cormeilles-en-Parisis" mapatay i capi nu Pa-li, u mutesakay nu nisanga'an mutesekay nu kucungay atu mutesakay nu hwa-sye. na u mutesekay nu mikulitay tu hekal nu paazihan, zikuz nisanga'an tu Ta-kay-al a ing-pan-ba, singangan aca tu Ta-kay-al a pisasing. 1839 a mihca 8 a bulad 19 a demiad Hwa-kow ke-sye atu kucungay sye-yen micakay tu teked a sapisasing, patahkal musakamu tu hekalay, pakatineng izaw tu ku sapisasing. Ť∑Įśėď¬∑ťõÖŚÖč¬∑ŤäíšĽ£¬∑ťĀĒŤďčÁąĺ(ś≥ēŤ™ě:Louis-Jacques-Mand√© Daguerre,1787ŚĻī11śúą18śó•‚ÄĒ1851ŚĻī7śúą10śó•), :Cormeilles-en-Parisis), . nilaculan nikauzipan Ta-kay-al naminanam patizeng, miseyki tu paigian atu nikulitan hamin ku hekal, i paazihan a singangan ku nikulutan. misanga' tu malikatay pangisulay maazih ku kasahiza i 1822 a mihca 7 a bulad i Pa-li malingatu paazih. 1827 a micaan ci Ni-ay-pu-s misanga' tu nu kitakitay saayaway u tahazikau nu matenesay a sasing "u likat nu cilal ku palahedaway tu sasing". tusa a mihcaan zikuz makakadum ci Ta-kay-al aci Ni-ay-pu-s, malingatu tatusa tu sakay sepat a mihcaan a kakadum. 1833 a mihcaan bahal mapatay ci Ni-ay-pu-s. ci Ni-ay-pu-s aci Ta-al-kay a kakadum angangan a lalekalan a miliyung cinizaan tu nisanga'an pangasu maazih ku nikulitan a pakala tu kapahay a ngangan. ci Ni-ay-pu-s u miin-swaay a sayhu, nalimaan niza u kalamkamay a izaw ku in-swa-pan. ci Ta-kay-al pitapal makaawas tu nalimaan ni Ni-ay-pu-s taneng misakalamkam ciniza tu kaizaw nu pikulit tu pangasutay maazih. . 1839 a nihcaan Ta-kay-al musakamu ci Ta-kay-al tu pisasing pakal tu maedem ku kalaheci. lecad a mihca1 a bulad 9 a demiad Ba-kow ke-sye-yen i zyasian malecaday a musakamu. Ba-kow cen-hu pasay Ta-kay-al tekeday a sapicakay, lecad a mihca 8 a bulad 19 a demiad Ba-kow cen-hu musakamu uyni a nisanga' u sakay "cayay paacaen pabeli tu kitakit" a sinubu. 1839 "ÁöĄÁ¶ģÁČ©. ci Ta-kay-al makay cen-hu pakala tu balakiay a sapahabay a kalisiw, nika ci Ni-ay-pu-s a iluc caay pakaala. sazikuzay Ni-ay-pu-s tatamaan a wawa mikusu tu cen-bu pakala aca tu cacay balakiay tu a sapahabay a kalisiw a tayni pakatineng tu kasingangan nu ama niza. Ta-kay-al kabatad tu Pa-li 12 kung-liay a Ma-en a sa'wac i lilis nu sa'wac a Pu-li "kamu nu Ba, Bry-sur-Marne" mapatay, tademan izaw ku cacay pikiningan a paya. Namahi uyza Ay-bey-al-tye-taay a nitu'tu'an tu 72 a kasilac. i Ta-kay-al pigingkiwan tu sapisasing namahiza ci Wi-lyen.Bu-ke-s.Ta-al-po-te i Ing-kow tatungus migingkiw tu ka-low-ba. tatusa siwantan tu ku pikawaw nuheni tu sakay nalimaan a kitakit similaangay. tawya dengadengay a "Ow-co-Ta-lu a liwku" zyasiay sipaina tu nikulitan a pal, gizice misasing caay ku taneng patakalaw a kakapah ku sasing, asaca salihalay tu kakapah nu pihibangan zazatengen mala ayzaay a sasing. sakay midiput tu nisanga'an niza, ci Ta-kay-al i 1839 a mihca 8 a bulad 12 a demiad misinsi tu nu Ing-kow tekeday a situngus "uyza i Ba-kow musakamu tuynian a nalimaad, "cayay paacaen pabeli tu kitakit tu ayaw cacay a lipay. uyni a kawaw mahaymaw tu ku pisasing a nilimaan i Ing-koway nipalahad. Ing-kow u cacayay i kitikat midiputay kuyni tekeday a tungus. i Ing-kow taneng tatungus tu hulic amicukaymas tu Ta-kay-al a misasing a gizice caay kakatuud ku tademaw, u zuma ci An-to-wan.Ke-law-te-te. mahizaay ni Ta-kay-al nipisasing a tademaw. mihiniay tademaway a sasing a pinaay tatukian kya malepun a masasing, masasingay a tademaw kanca la'cus misaungay. macekuk ci Sa-myaw-al.Mu-al-s makazih ku Pa-liay zazanay a pasasing Ta-kay-al i pisasingan inayi' ku cacacay a tademaw, katukuh amatineng kuyni zayhan tanaya' tatu ku nipalikat, namahiza caay kaazih nu mikawaway a tademaw. zikuz micukaymas tu kadadawaay tangah nu dadingu tadeng aapuyu' ku tatukia ku nipalikat. kanahatu Ta-kay-al a pisasing caay ku tudungan "uyza u sapisasing sakay uyaanay a sapad muliyaw aca misasing", micukaymas amin ku tademaw tu ni Ta-kay-al a sapisasing masasing tu ku cacay lasubu a sassing. 1851 a mihcaan, kapatayan ni Ta-kay-al a mihcaan, 1851 a mihcaan nikaawas tu malahemeday a sapad Ke-low-tin a kawaw Ta-al-pow-teay a pisasing tabaki ku nikasumad, galasu a bu-pan taneng palalecad a misanga' tu yadahay mahapinangay a sasing. uyni palahad ci Ta-kay-al tu sapisasing kalamkam malakui't malawpes tu.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == r~…ĺu-i.ja-k…ô.maŇč-taj.ta-kaj-ar~…ĺ "kamu nu ba, r~…ĺouis-*a ¶*u…ôs-mand* dagu…ôrr…ô, **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad-**** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad" r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i ba-kow-wa-r~…ĺ…ô-t…ô-wa- ¶…ô-s…ôn-pa-r~…ĺi-si a kitizaan a k…ô-ar~…ĺ-m…ô-j…ô "ba a kamu, ¶orm…ôir~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôs-…ôn-parisis" mapataj i ¶api nu pa-r~…ĺi, u mut…ôsakaj nu nisaŇča Ē~ °an mut…ôs…ôkaj nu ku ¶uŇčaj atu mut…ôsakaj nu ńßwa-sj…ô. na u mut…ôs…ôkaj nu mikur~…ĺitaj tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu paazińßan, zikuz nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu ta-kaj-ar~…ĺ a iŇč-pan-ba, siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu ta-kaj-ar~…ĺ a pisasiŇč. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad ńßwa-kow k…ô-sj…ô atu ku ¶uŇčaj sj…ô-j…ôn mi ¶akaj tu t…ôk…ôd a sapisasiŇč, patańßkar~…ĺ musakamu tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj, pakatin…ôŇč izaw tu ku sapisasiŇč. ************(**:r~…ĺouis-*a ¶*u…ôs-mand* dagu…ôrr…ô,**********************), : ¶orm…ôir~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôs-…ôn-parisis), . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan nikauzipan ta-kaj-ar~…ĺ naminanam patiz…ôŇč, mis…ôki tu paigian atu nikur~…ĺitan ńßamin ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, i paazińßan a siŇčaŇčan ku nikur~…ĺutan. misaŇča Ē~ ° tu mar~…ĺikataj paŇčisur~…ĺaj maazińß ku kasańßiza i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad i pa-r~…ĺi mar~…ĺiŇčatu paazińß. **** a mi ¶aan ¶i ni-aj-pu-s misaŇča Ē~ ° tu nu kitakitaj saajawaj u tańßazikau nu mat…ôn…ôsaj a sasiŇč "u r~…ĺikat nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ ku par~…ĺańß…ôdawaj tu sasiŇč". tusa a mińß ¶aan zikuz makakadum ¶i ta-kaj-ar~…ĺ a ¶i ni-aj-pu-s, mar~…ĺiŇčatu tatusa tu sakaj s…ôpat a mińß ¶aan a kakadum. **** a mińß ¶aan bańßar~…ĺ mapataj ¶i ni-aj-pu-s. ¶i ni-aj-pu-s a ¶i ta-ar~…ĺ-kaj a kakadum aŇčaŇčan a r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan a mir~…ĺijuŇč ¶inizaan tu nisaŇča Ē~ °an paŇčasu maazińß ku nikur~…ĺitan a pakar~…ĺa tu kapańßaj a ŇčaŇčan. ¶i ni-aj-pu-s u miin-swaaj a sajńßu, nar~…ĺimaan niza u kar~…ĺamkamaj a izaw ku in-swa-pan. ¶i ta-kaj-ar~…ĺ pitapar~…ĺ makaawas tu nar~…ĺimaan ni ni-aj-pu-s tan…ôŇč misakar~…ĺamkam ¶iniza tu kaizaw nu pikur~…ĺit tu paŇčasutaj maazińß. . **** a nińß ¶aan ta-kaj-ar~…ĺ musakamu ¶i ta-kaj-ar~…ĺ tu pisasiŇč pakar~…ĺ tu ma…ôd…ôm ku kar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i. r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a mińß ¶a* a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad ba-kow k…ô-sj…ô-j…ôn i zjasian mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a musakamu. ba-kow ¶…ôn-ńßu pasaj ta-kaj-ar~…ĺ t…ôk…ôdaj a sapi ¶akaj, r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad ba-kow ¶…ôn-ńßu musakamu ujni a nisaŇča Ē~ ° u sakaj " ¶ajaj paa ¶a…ôn pab…ôr~…ĺi tu kitakit" a sinubu. **** "***. ¶i ta-kaj-ar~…ĺ makaj ¶…ôn-ńßu pakar~…ĺa tu bar~…ĺakiaj a sapańßabaj a kar~…ĺisiw, nika ¶i ni-aj-pu-s a ir~…ĺu ¶ ¶aaj pakaar~…ĺa. sazikuzaj ni-aj-pu-s tatamaan a wawa mikusu tu ¶…ôn-bu pakar~…ĺa a ¶a tu ¶a ¶aj bar~…ĺakiaj tu a sapańßabaj a kar~…ĺisiw a tajni pakatin…ôŇč tu kasiŇčaŇčan nu ama niza. ta-kaj-ar~…ĺ kabatad tu pa-r~…ĺi ** kuŇč-r~…ĺiaj a ma-…ôn a sa Ē~ °wa ¶ i r~…ĺir~…ĺis nu sa Ē~ °wa ¶ a pu-r~…ĺi "kamu nu ba, brj-sur-marn…ô" mapataj, tad…ôman izaw ku ¶a ¶aj pikiniŇčan a paja. namańßi ujza aj-b…ô-ar~…ĺ-tj…ô-taaj a nitu Ē~ °tu Ē~ °an tu ** a kasir~…ĺa ¶. i ta-kaj-ar~…ĺ pigiŇčkiwan tu sapisasiŇč namańßiza ¶i wi-r~…ĺj…ôn.bu-k…ô-s.ta-ar~…ĺ-po-t…ô i iŇč-kow tatuŇčus migiŇčkiw tu ka-r~…ĺow-ba. tatusa siwantan tu ku pikawaw nuńß…ôni tu sakaj nar~…ĺimaan a kitakit simir~…ĺaaŇčaj. tawja d…ôŇčad…ôŇčaj a "ow- ¶o-ta-r~…ĺu a r~…ĺiwku" zjasiaj sipaina tu nikur~…ĺitan a par~…ĺ, gizi ¶…ô misasiŇč ¶aaj ku tan…ôŇč patakar~…ĺaw a kakapańß ku sasiŇč, asa ¶a sar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj tu kakapańß nu pińßibaŇčan zazat…ôŇč…ôn mar~…ĺa ajzaaj a sasiŇč. sakaj midiput tu nisaŇča Ē~ °an niza, ¶i ta-kaj-ar~…ĺ i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad misinsi tu nu iŇč-kow t…ôk…ôdaj a situŇčus "ujza i ba-kow musakamu tujnian a nar~…ĺimaad, " ¶ajaj paa ¶a…ôn pab…ôr~…ĺi tu kitakit tu ajaw ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺipaj. ujni a kawaw mańßajmaw tu ku pisasiŇč a nir~…ĺimaan i iŇč-kowaj nipar~…ĺańßad. iŇč-kow u ¶a ¶ajaj i kitikat midiputaj kujni t…ôk…ôdaj a tuŇčus. i iŇč-kow tan…ôŇč tatuŇčus tu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ ami ¶ukajmas tu ta-kaj-ar~…ĺ a misasiŇč a gizi ¶…ô ¶aaj kakatuud ku tad…ômaw, u zuma ¶i an-to-wan.k…ô-r~…ĺaw-t…ô-t…ô. mańßizaaj ni ta-kaj-ar~…ĺ nipisasiŇč a tad…ômaw. mińßiniaj tad…ômawaj a sasiŇč a pinaaj tatukian kja mar~…ĺ…ôpun a masasiŇč, masasiŇčaj a tad…ômaw kan ¶a r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us misauŇčaj. ma ¶…ôkuk ¶i sa-mjaw-ar~…ĺ.mu-ar~…ĺ-s makazińß ku pa-r~…ĺiaj zazanaj a pasasiŇč ta-kaj-ar~…ĺ i pisasiŇčan inaji Ē~ ° ku ¶a ¶a ¶aj a tad…ômaw, katukuńß amatin…ôŇč kujni zajńßan tanaja Ē~ ° tatu ku nipar~…ĺikat, namańßiza ¶aaj kaazińß nu mikawawaj a tad…ômaw. zikuz mi ¶ukajmas tu kadadawaaj taŇčańß nu dadiŇču tad…ôŇč aapuju Ē~ ° ku tatukia ku nipar~…ĺikat. kanańßatu ta-kaj-ar~…ĺ a pisasiŇč ¶aaj ku tuduŇčan "ujza u sapisasiŇč sakaj ujaanaj a sapad mur~…ĺijaw a ¶a misasiŇč", mi ¶ukajmas amin ku tad…ômaw tu ni ta-kaj-ar~…ĺ a sapisasiŇč masasiŇč tu ku ¶a ¶aj r~…ĺasubu a sassiŇč. **** a mińß ¶aan, kapatajan ni ta-kaj-ar~…ĺ a mińß ¶aan, **** a mińß ¶aan nikaawas tu mar~…ĺańß…ôm…ôdaj a sapad k…ô-r~…ĺow-tin a kawaw ta-ar~…ĺ-pow-t…ôaj a pisasiŇč tabaki ku nikasumad, gar~…ĺasu a bu-pan tan…ôŇč par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a misaŇča Ē~ ° tu jadańßaj mańßapinaŇčaj a sasiŇč. ujni par~…ĺańßad ¶i ta-kaj-ar~…ĺ tu sapisasiŇč kar~…ĺamkam mar~…ĺakui Ē~ °t mar~…ĺawp…ôs tu.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Lu-i.ya-ke.mang-tay.Ta-kay-al "kamu nu Ba, Louis-Jacques-Mand√© Daguerre, 1787 a mihca 11 a bulad 18 a demiad-1851 a mihca 7 a bulad 10 a demiad" lecuh i Ba-kow-wa-le-te-wa-ce-sen-pa-li-si a kitizaan a Ke-al-mey-ye "Ba a kamu, Cormeilles-en-Parisis" mapatay i capi nu Pa-li, u mutesakay nu nisanga'an mutesekay nu kucungay atu mutesakay nu hwa-sye. na u mutesekay nu mikulitay tu hekal nu paazihan, zikuz nisanga'an tu Ta-kay-al a ing-pan-ba, singangan aca tu Ta-kay-al a pisasing. 1839 a mihca 8 a bulad 19 a demiad Hwa-kow ke-sye atu kucungay sye-yen micakay tu teked a sapisasing, patahkal musakamu tu hekalay, pakatineng izaw tu ku sapisasing. Ť∑Įśėď¬∑ťõÖŚÖč¬∑ŤäíšĽ£¬∑ťĀĒŤďčÁąĺ(ś≥ēŤ™ě:Louis-Jacques-Mand√© Daguerre,1787ŚĻī11śúą18śó•‚ÄĒ1851ŚĻī7śúą10śó•), :Cormeilles-en-Parisis), . nilaculan nikauzipan Ta-kay-al naminanam patizeng, miseyki tu paigian atu nikulitan hamin ku hekal, i paazihan a singangan ku nikulutan. misanga' tu malikatay pangisulay maazih ku kasahiza i 1822 a mihca 7 a bulad i Pa-li malingatu paazih. 1827 a micaan ci Ni-ay-pu-s misanga' tu nu kitakitay saayaway u tahazikau nu matenesay a sasing "u likat nu cilal ku palahedaway tu sasing". tusa a mihcaan zikuz makakadum ci Ta-kay-al aci Ni-ay-pu-s, malingatu tatusa tu sakay sepat a mihcaan a kakadum. 1833 a mihcaan bahal mapatay ci Ni-ay-pu-s. ci Ni-ay-pu-s aci Ta-al-kay a kakadum angangan a lalekalan a miliyung cinizaan tu nisanga'an pangasu maazih ku nikulitan a pakala tu kapahay a ngangan. ci Ni-ay-pu-s u miin-swaay a sayhu, nalimaan niza u kalamkamay a izaw ku in-swa-pan. ci Ta-kay-al pitapal makaawas tu nalimaan ni Ni-ay-pu-s taneng misakalamkam ciniza tu kaizaw nu pikulit tu pangasutay maazih. . 1839 a nihcaan Ta-kay-al musakamu ci Ta-kay-al tu pisasing pakal tu maedem ku kalaheci. lecad a mihca1 a bulad 9 a demiad Ba-kow ke-sye-yen i zyasian malecaday a musakamu. Ba-kow cen-hu pasay Ta-kay-al tekeday a sapicakay, lecad a mihca 8 a bulad 19 a demiad Ba-kow cen-hu musakamu uyni a nisanga' u sakay "cayay paacaen pabeli tu kitakit" a sinubu. 1839 "ÁöĄÁ¶ģÁČ©. ci Ta-kay-al makay cen-hu pakala tu balakiay a sapahabay a kalisiw, nika ci Ni-ay-pu-s a iluc caay pakaala. sazikuzay Ni-ay-pu-s tatamaan a wawa mikusu tu cen-bu pakala aca tu cacay balakiay tu a sapahabay a kalisiw a tayni pakatineng tu kasingangan nu ama niza. Ta-kay-al kabatad tu Pa-li 12 kung-liay a Ma-en a sa'wac i lilis nu sa'wac a Pu-li "kamu nu Ba, Bry-sur-Marne" mapatay, tademan izaw ku cacay pikiningan a paya. Namahi uyza Ay-bey-al-tye-taay a nitu'tu'an tu 72 a kasilac. i Ta-kay-al pigingkiwan tu sapisasing namahiza ci Wi-lyen.Bu-ke-s.Ta-al-po-te i Ing-kow tatungus migingkiw tu ka-low-ba. tatusa siwantan tu ku pikawaw nuheni tu sakay nalimaan a kitakit similaangay. tawya dengadengay a "Ow-co-Ta-lu a liwku" zyasiay sipaina tu nikulitan a pal, gizice misasing caay ku taneng patakalaw a kakapah ku sasing, asaca salihalay tu kakapah nu pihibangan zazatengen mala ayzaay a sasing. sakay midiput tu nisanga'an niza, ci Ta-kay-al i 1839 a mihca 8 a bulad 12 a demiad misinsi tu nu Ing-kow tekeday a situngus "uyza i Ba-kow musakamu tuynian a nalimaad, "cayay paacaen pabeli tu kitakit tu ayaw cacay a lipay. uyni a kawaw mahaymaw tu ku pisasing a nilimaan i Ing-koway nipalahad. Ing-kow u cacayay i kitikat midiputay kuyni tekeday a tungus. i Ing-kow taneng tatungus tu hulic amicukaymas tu Ta-kay-al a misasing a gizice caay kakatuud ku tademaw, u zuma ci An-to-wan.Ke-law-te-te. mahizaay ni Ta-kay-al nipisasing a tademaw. mihiniay tademaway a sasing a pinaay tatukian kya malepun a masasing, masasingay a tademaw kanca la'cus misaungay. macekuk ci Sa-myaw-al.Mu-al-s makazih ku Pa-liay zazanay a pasasing Ta-kay-al i pisasingan inayi' ku cacacay a tademaw, katukuh amatineng kuyni zayhan tanaya' tatu ku nipalikat, namahiza caay kaazih nu mikawaway a tademaw. zikuz micukaymas tu kadadawaay tangah nu dadingu tadeng aapuyu' ku tatukia ku nipalikat. kanahatu Ta-kay-al a pisasing caay ku tudungan "uyza u sapisasing sakay uyaanay a sapad muliyaw aca misasing", micukaymas amin ku tademaw tu ni Ta-kay-al a sapisasing masasing tu ku cacay lasubu a sassing. 1851 a mihcaan, kapatayan ni Ta-kay-al a mihcaan, 1851 a mihcaan nikaawas tu malahemeday a sapad Ke-low-tin a kawaw Ta-al-pow-teay a pisasing tabaki ku nikasumad, galasu a bu-pan taneng palalecad a misanga' tu yadahay mahapinangay a sasing. uyni palahad ci Ta-kay-al tu sapisasing kalamkam malakui't malawpes tu.

mut…ôs…ôkaj nu ku ¶uŇčaj atu mut…ôsakaj nu ńßwa-sj…ô. na u mut…ôs…ôkaj nu mikur~…ĺitaj tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu paazińßan, zikuz nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu ta-kaj-ar~…ĺ a iŇč-pan-ba, siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu ta-kaj-ar~…ĺ a pisasiŇč. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad ńßwa-kow k…ô-sj…ô atu ku ¶uŇčaj sj…ô-j…ôn mi ¶akaj tu t…ôk…ôd a sapisasiŇč, patańßkar~…ĺ musakamu tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj, pakatin…ôŇč izaw tu ku sapisasiŇč. nikur~…ĺitan ńßamin ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, i paazińßan a siŇčaŇčan ku nikur~…ĺutan. misaŇča Ē~ ° tu mar~…ĺikataj paŇčisur~…ĺaj maazińß ku kasańßiza i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad i pa-r~…ĺi mar~…ĺiŇčatu aŇčaŇčan a r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan a mir~…ĺijuŇč ¶inizaan tu nisaŇča Ē~ °an paŇčasu maazińß ku nikur~…ĺitan a pakar~…ĺa tu kapańßaj a ŇčaŇčan. ¶i ni-aj-pu-s u miin-swaaj a sajńßu, nar~…ĺimaan niza u ¶…ôn-ńßu pasaj ta-kaj-ar~…ĺ t…ôk…ôdaj a sapi ¶akaj, r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad ba-kow ¶…ôn-ńßu musakamu ujni a nisaŇča Ē~ ° u sakaj " ¶ajaj paa ¶a…ôn pab…ôr~…ĺi tu kitakit" a r~…ĺir~…ĺis nu sa Ē~ °wa ¶ a pu-r~…ĺi "kamu nu ba, brj-sur-marn…ô" mapataj, tad…ôman izaw ku ¶a ¶aj pikiniŇčan a paja. namańßi ujza aj-b…ô-ar~…ĺ-tj…ô-taaj a nitu Ē~ °tu Ē~ °an tu ** a kasir~…ĺa ¶. i kitakit simir~…ĺaaŇčaj. tawja d…ôŇčad…ôŇčaj a "ow- ¶o-ta-r~…ĺu a r~…ĺiwku" zjasiaj sipaina tu nikur~…ĺitan a par~…ĺ, gizi ¶…ô misasiŇč ¶aaj ku tan…ôŇč patakar~…ĺaw a kakapańß ku sasiŇč, asa ¶a sar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj tu kakapańß nu pińßibaŇčan zazat…ôŇč…ôn mar~…ĺa ajzaaj a sasiŇč. sakaj midiput tu nisaŇča Ē~ °an niza, ¶i ta-kaj-ar~…ĺ i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad misinsi tu nu iŇč-kow t…ôk…ôdaj a situŇčus "ujza i ba-kow musakamu tujnian a nar~…ĺimaad, " ¶ajaj paa ¶a…ôn pab…ôr~…ĺi tu kitakit tu ajaw ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺipaj. ujni a kawaw mańßajmaw tu ku pisasiŇč a nir~…ĺimaan i iŇč-kowaj nipar~…ĺańßad. iŇč-kow u ¶a ¶ajaj i kitikat midiputaj kujni t…ôk…ôdaj a tuŇčus. i iŇč-kow tan…ôŇč tatuŇčus tu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ ami ¶ukajmas tu ta-kaj-ar~…ĺ a misasiŇč a gizi ¶…ô ¶aaj kakatuud ku tad…ômaw, u zuma ¶i an-to-wan.k…ô-r~…ĺaw-t…ô-t…ô. mańßizaaj ni ta-kaj-ar~…ĺ nipisasiŇč a tad…ômaw. mińßiniaj tad…ômawaj a sasiŇč a pinaaj tatukian kja mar~…ĺ…ôpun a masasiŇč, masasiŇčaj a tad…ômaw kan ¶a r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us misauŇčaj. ma ¶…ôkuk ¶i sa-mjaw-ar~…ĺ.mu-ar~…ĺ-s makazińß ku pa-r~…ĺiaj zazanaj a pasasiŇč ta-kaj-ar~…ĺ i pisasiŇčan inaji Ē~ ° ku ¶a ¶a ¶aj a tad…ômaw, katukuńß amatin…ôŇč kujni zajńßan tanaja Ē~ ° tatu ku nipar~…ĺikat, namańßiza ¶aaj kaazińß nu mikawawaj a tad…ômaw. zikuz mi ¶ukajmas tu kadadawaaj taŇčańß nu dadiŇču tad…ôŇč aapuju Ē~ ° ku tatukia ku nipar~…ĺikat. kanańßatu ta-kaj-ar~…ĺ a pisasiŇč ¶aaj ku tuduŇčan "ujza u sapisasiŇč sakaj ujaanaj a sapad mur~…ĺijaw a ¶a misasiŇč", mi ¶ukajmas amin ku tad…ômaw tu ni ta-kaj-ar~…ĺ a sapisasiŇč masasiŇč tu ku ¶a ¶aj r~…ĺasubu a sassiŇč.
